description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on push to master branch and on pull requests to master, excluding changes to markdown files. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with different compilers and shells, and a separate cppcheck job on ubuntu-latest. Install dependencies, configure, build, and install the project on each build job, and run cppcheck on the cppcheck job.
